assertions.reason: Homepage and approach page use a warm, weighted palette (warm off-white background, dark warm text, muted red-brown accents) rather than cool/corporate tones.
evidence: computed-style: body background rgb(245, 240, 230), body text rgb(43, 40, 36)

assertions.reason: Primary typography is Berkeley Mono/monospace with clear hierarchy and intentional weight/spacing across headings and body copy.
First-load impression is distinctive and operative (monospaced system aesthetic, structural sectioning, dense factual copy), not generic corporate/startup/guru or empty-minimal.
evidence: visual-observation: strong site-specific character via typography, grid blocks, and restrained warm palette

frictions: A floating agent-browser toolbar briefly overlays central content during capture; full-page screenshots still retained required sections for these assertions.
